title: Bunkie
subtitle: Home Services Marketplace
overview: Bunkie is a full-stack home services marketplace connecting verified service providers with homeowners across multiple continents. Built for scale, the platform handles real-time booking, payments, and provider verification across 5 regions.
problem: Homeowners across the UK, US, Canada, China, and Africa struggled to find reliable, vetted service providers for home maintenance and improvement tasks. Existing platforms lacked trust mechanisms, transparent pricing, and cross-region support.
solution: A unified marketplace with end-to-end encrypted messaging, escrow-based payment protection, multi-language support, and a rigorous provider verification pipeline. The platform serves both web and mobile users through a responsive PWA architecture.

features.title: Smart Provider Matching
features.description: ML-powered matching algorithm that pairs homeowners with the best-rated providers based on location, skillset, availability, and pricing preferences.

features.title: Escrow Payment System
features.description: Funds are held in escrow and released only after job completion confirmation, ensuring both parties are protected throughout the transaction.

features.title: Real-time Booking Engine
features.description: Calendar-based booking with instant confirmation, automated reminders, and rescheduling capabilities with provider availability syncing.

features.title: Provider Verification Suite
features.description: Multi-step verification including ID checks, background screening, skill assessments, and customer review analysis before provider approval.

architecture.title: Modular Monolith with Event-Driven Communication
architecture.description: The platform follows a modular monolith architecture with clearly bounded contexts. Each domain (bookings, payments, providers, users) operates independently within the same deployment, communicating via an internal event bus powered by Redis pub/sub.
highlights: API Gateway pattern for rate limiting and request routing
CQRS for read/write separation on the booking engine
Materialized views for provider search indexes
Staged event-driven architecture for payment reconciliation

results.description: Verified service providers across all regions
Provider response time to booking requests
Month-over-month retention rate for repeat users

testimonial.quote: Bunkie transformed how we connect homeowners with trusted providers. The escrow system alone reduced disputes by 94% compared to industry averages.
testimonial.author: Tunde Adeyemi
